form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Straight (19.15) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length fourth. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors five starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (23.95) at this track over 407m. Solid beginner who should take some running down.
